purpose: Iterative expansion control for broad Skill discovery, filtering, adaptation, and curated intake. This is not approval, release inventory, or runtime installation evidence.

rounds.goal: Broaden the repository beyond software engineering by making discovery, domain coverage, and candidate-source radar explicit and verifiable.
exitCriteria: next-batch candidate sources are named but not approved

rounds.goal: Pin and audit small batches of direct third-party Skill sources with clear license posture and broad non-software-engineering value.
allowedChanges: security, portability, and overlap audit evidence
exitCriteria: each source has pinned revision and license review
candidate Skills have adopt, merge, recipe-only, adapter-only, reference, or reject decisions
no candidate enters release inventory without approval

rounds.historicalPlannedGoal: Adapt approved candidates into neutral, portable, non-duplicative Skill payloads or route them into existing Skills, recipes, references, or rejections.
rounds.goal: Rebaseline Round 03 as an evidence-backed capability survey and residual-gap proof phase before any later adaptation, admission, or repository-authored implementation.
allowedChanges: governed STM, P, and SG demand-record extraction
dated native, official, runtime, installed, and already-authorized baseline evidence
bounded public read-only metadata discovery, clustering, and duplicate suppression
source-pinned representative review without candidate execution
alternative comparison, residual-gap adjudication, and reviewed current-repository evidence
blockedChanges: candidate code execution, installation, or account connection
Skill admission, release-manifest or generated-routing mutation, repository-authored implementation, or Hook enablement
local runtime sync, cross-repository write, or remote push
exitCriteria: the capability-survey goal, scope, sequence, data boundary, authority boundary, and stop rule are explicit
the read-only STM, P, and SG source identities, evidence states, and promotion firewall are source-pinned and verified
all ten required result-package items map to acceptance and verification surfaces
owner review decides whether bounded read-only discovery may activate

consumerProjectionBoundary.reason: The dated Round 02 execution record proves only the bounded authorized transaction. Live Agent integration, installation, backup, restore, and current parity remain consumer-owned and require fresh evidence.
